name: @hd-agent-skills/codebase-analyzer-docs
description: Claude Code plugin: generate deep, structured onboarding documentation for a codebase — architecture, module deep-dives, grounded snippets, and Mermaid diagrams.

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
[codebase-analyzer-docs] Installed. Register with Claude Code:
  /plugin marketplace add ' + require('path').resolve(__dirname) + '
  /plugin install codebase-analyzer-docs
')"
